cards.text: ── LIVE Tier S (4) ──

bot.name: EWJ Mon/Fri Intraday
bot.subtitle: EWJ 月曜+金曜のみ open BUY → close SELL (intraday only). 検証 Mon Sh+1.81 / Fri +1.61、overnight は持たない (Mon ovn -22.5%/yr 回避)
bot.role: EWJ Mon/Fri intraday LONG. 検証 2018-2025 (yasuda_quant prices/EWJ.pkl): Mon intraday Sh+1.81 (overnight -22.5%/yr ペナルティ回避)、Fri intraday Sh+1.61。火-木 skip。phase=daily MOO BUY (Mon/Fri open) → phase=moc MOC SELL (same day close)。overnight 一切持たない。sleeve 5% NetLiq、user 2026-06-14 paper 配備承認。

bot.name: Gov Contract Drift
bot.subtitle: US 政府 $500M+ 契約発表 → 10d hold drift. defense (LMT/BA/RTX/GD/NOC) + health. Sh+1.11 win 60% n=563
bot.role: US gov spending contract drift。2026-06-27 user 要請で復帰。PDT は月曜 fire 時に再 reject なら再 disable。

stats.annual_est: backtest +57-62%/yr、actual half でも tier S 級

bot.role: Pattern B Resurrection #8 (Tier S): top 5 momentum. X21 BOTH_PASS Sh 1.55->1.72 ann +57->+61%。最強。

bot.subtitle: VIX/VIX3M >= 1.05 (backwardation = stress) → SPY 5d LONG. 検証 Sh+1.62 win 70.2% (n=57)、stress 後 mean reversion 取り、年 5-7 回 fire

stats.dual_sieve_2026_06_20: X13 in-trade Sh 0.94→2.04 ann +41.6%→+61.3% (B sieve で大幅強化、20-23 で逆張り失敗の規律守れた証拠)、希発火 6% of days で win 60% → Tier S 昇格 (元 A)

bot.role: VIX termstructure backwardation → SPY LONG 5d。2026-06-27 user 要請で復帰。

cards.text: ── LIVE Tier A (4) ──

bot.name: C3 Connors RSI2
bot.subtitle: Connors RSI(2) mean-reversion。Daily scan top200 mcap、RSI(2)<10 AND Close>200d SMA → BUY、Exit Close>5d SMA or max 10d。X3 dual sieve BOTH_PASS Sh 1.22→1.53 ann +22.5%→+22.6% (regime neutral)。Pattern B Resurrection 2/5。
bot.role: Pattern B Resurrection #2: Connors RSI(2)。2026-06-27 user 要請で復帰。

bot.name: Earnings Universal
bot.subtitle: 502 ticker universal: pos surprise>=10% momentum + neg<=-5% dip-buy, 5d hold. n=2156 events Sh+1.31-1.82 robust
bot.role: Earnings universal surprise (502 ticker universe). 検証 2018-2025 n=2156 events: pos>=10% / hold=5d Sh+1.31 win 57.3% / neg<=-5% LONG (dip-buy) Sh+1.33 win 57.3%. earnings_bot (LLY/NVDA H3 のみ) の上位互換、universe 502× + bidirectional。daily phase auto、yasuda_quant/data/earnings_estimate/*_history.csv 経由。sleeve 1.5%×max 8 = 12% NetLiq。

bot.name: O1 SPY Overnight
bot.subtitle: SPY overnight effect (close→open)。MOC BUY 15:55 ET、MOO SELL 09:31 ET 翌日。X6 dual sieve BOTH_PASS Sh 0.91→1.57 ann +10.4%→+13.1%。Pattern B Resurrection 5/5、$13k での最有力候補 (SPY 1 ETF、commission % 最小)、7/15 live 本命。

stats.annual_est: backtest +10.4-13.1%/yr、$13k で 17 株 fully invested

bot.role: Pattern B Resurrection #5: SPY overnight。2026-06-30 cover 後 re-enable (2026-07-01)。

bot.name: XLK Drop5d h1
bot.subtitle: XLK 5d c2c return <= -5% → 翌寄付 BUY → 翌々寄付 SELL (h1 LONG only). autopilot 2026-06-12 TIER_3 FLAG (raw cell)、XLF cell との同時 fire 時は panic_cap で entry skip

stats.dual_sieve_2026_06_20: X13 in-trade Sh 0.88→1.38 ann +31.8%→+42.5%、X14 NEITHER だが in-trade で真 edge 確認 → Tier A 昇格 (元 B)

bot.role: XLK_DROP5D_COSTGATE_V1 paper observation (XLK 5d c2c return <= -5% → 翌営業日寄付 MOO BUY → 翌々営業日寄付 MOO SELL, LONG only h1). autopilot 2026-06-12T1518Z TIER_3 FLAG raw cell 正式化 (XLF より半 notch 下、resid 有意性 matched control のみ、β 成分 68-79%). typical cost (片道 7.5bp): net OOS raw +1.130%/trade oSh 5.33 NW-t 2.77. trigger 頻度 9.6/年 (XLF Fri cell の約 2 倍). XLF 重複 11 日 raw corr +0.821、panic_cap で XLF position 存在時 entry skip。sleeve 5% NetLiq、user 2026-06-13 paper 配備承認。

bot.name: Buyback XS Contrarian
bot.subtitle: yasuda_quant/data/buyback の trailing 12mo Repurchase/mktcap で 503 ticker ranking、bottom decile 10 銘柄 monthly rebal、21d hold。教科書と逆 = 低 buyback 銘柄が outperform。2026-06-17 SINGLE-TEST FLAG-D paper 配備

stats.annual_est: backtest +5.30%/63d bot decile vs -0.60% top, live想定 0.3-0.5x
stats.dual_sieve_2026_06_20: A1 BOTH_PASS 確認 (X1) +7.41%→+9.84% (excl 2020-2023 で強化) → Tier A 昇格 (元 D)

bot.role: buyback XS contrarian (LOW buyback = BUY). yasuda_quant/data/buyback の trailing 12mo Repurchase Of Capital Stock / mktcap で全 ticker ranking、bottom decile 10銘柄を月次 rebalance、21d hold。backtest 503 ticker × 19 quarters で top-bot decile diff = -5.90% t=-2.99 (single test FLAG-D 候補)。教科書と逆方向 = 低 buyback 銘柄が outperform。sleeve 1% × max 10 = 10% NetLiq、paper-only、user 2026-06-17 配備承認。caveat: single test、multi-period sign-consistency 未検証、live 想定 Sh +0.3-0.5。

bot.role: Expanded overnight basket (IWM/XLE/XLRE/XLU). iwm_overnight_bot 後継。sector overnight survey (2018-2025 yasuda_quant prices) で IWM (ovn Sh+1.10 / int Sh-0.35)、XLE (+0.89 / -0.27)、XLRE (+0.97 / -0.17)、XLU (+0.89 / +0.15) の 4 ticker は全て overnight 主体、intraday は弱い or マイナス。basket 化で sector 分散 + sample size 拡大。phase moc=buy close, daily=sell open。total sleeve 8% NetLiq (2% × 4)。user 2026-06-14 paper 配備承認。

bot.name: B5 PEAD Long
bot.subtitle: Post-earnings drift long (gap-up proxy)。Daily scan top200 mcap、1d gap >3% → BUY、21d hold、cooldown 60d。X4 dual sieve BOTH_PASS Sh 1.24→1.67 ann +26.1%→+28.3%。Pattern B Resurrection 3/5。
bot.role: Pattern B Resurrection #3: PEAD long. X4 BOTH_PASS Sh 1.24->1.67。

bot.name: Quality ROE Bull
bot.subtitle: fundamentals.csv の returnOnEquity 上位 20% basket、bull regime (>=3/4) のみ entry、top 10 銘柄 quarterly rebal、63d hold。walk-forward 9/10 yr positive (90%)、avg diff +12.86%/yr。2026-06-19 FLAG-C 候補 paper 配備

stats.annual_est: backtest +12.86%/yr avg basket diff, 0.3-0.5x retention → +4-6%/yr at 10% sleeve
stats.r6: WF 9/10 yr positive, 2020 covid のみ -9.39%
stats.placebo: snapshot ROE 限界、historical で真の walk-forward 必須
stats.dual_sieve_2026_06_20: B7 BOTH_PASS 確認、X33 bias 補正で全 3 期間 Sh > 1.0 stable → Tier A 昇格 (元 C)

bot.role: Quality factor (ROE) XS、bull regime gated. yasuda_quant/data/fundamentals.csv の returnOnEquity 上位 20% basket、bull regime (≥3/4 conditions: SPY>200d MA, VIX<25, SPY 20d ret>0, 10Y-3M spread>-0.5%) のみ entry。top 10 銘柄を quarterly (63d) rebal、63d hold。walk-forward 9/10 years positive (90%)、avg diff +12.86%/yr。sleeve 1% × max 10 = 10% NetLiq、paper 配備。user 2026-06-19 承認。caveat: snapshot ROE 使用、historical ROE での真の walk-forward 必須。

bot.name: Trend Follower (Clenow)
bot.subtitle: SPY/QQQ/IWM/EFA/TLT/GLD/DBC (7 ETF) を 100d MA + inverse 30d std weighting で rotation。weekly rebal 5% hysteresis。backtest 9yr Sh +0.98, maxDD -24%。2020 COVID +35% / 2022 bear -8.5% で defensive。bull/bear 両 regime 生存設計。2026-06-20 paper 配備

stats.dual_sieve_2026_06_20: E4 BOTH_PASS 確認 Sh 0.98→1.10 ann +12.1%→+10.6% → Tier A 昇格 (元 C)

bot.role: Clenow-style vol-normalized trend rotation. Universe SPY/QQQ/IWM/EFA/TLT/GLD/DBC (7 ETF), close > 100d MA = include, inverse 30d std weighting, weekly rebal with 5% hysteresis. backtest (E4) 9 years: Sharpe +0.98 vs SPY +0.90, maxDD -24% vs -34%. 2020 COVID +35% (SPY +18%), 2022 bear -8.5% (SPY -18%) = bull/bear 両 regime で生存。defensive complement role。sleeve 10% NetLiq total。user 2026-06-20 配備承認。

cards.title: bot 別 含み損益 (相対)

cards.text: autopilot_enabled = ON。 live broker_config の bot は実発注し得ます。
含み損 -3.14% が DD 閾値 -3.0% を超過。
閾値: 集中度 25% / DD 3.0% (config.toml [alerts] で調整可)。 VIX 緊急閾は file 取得時のみ評価。

tabs.subtitle: 実測 track record (paper TWS 廃止代替)

cards.text: Shadow Ledger 未起動、実験 bot が signal 出せば pending_trades.csv に記録され始めます。
scripts/close_shadow_trades.py を daily 01:30 CT に scheduled task で登録すれば 翌 open 価格で fill、hold_days 経過で close、summary.json 更新。
bot_health は Monday 07:30 頃 python -m scripts.monday_verification と併用で 全体 監視。stale >7d は 復活検討要 (config or state 問題)。
